metadata.description: A small, opinionated set of multi-agent plugins for Claude Code. Bridges to OpenAI Codex and Google Antigravity plus a Delphi debate primitive — sufficient for every capability worth multi-agenting, deliberately lightweight by construction.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: OpenAI Codex CLI bridge: hard reasoning (gpt-5.5 xhigh), code review, Playwright browser, image generation (gpt-image-2), session resume, raw exec. Structured 5-section handoff spec with audit trail on every call.

plugins.name: agy
plugins.description: Google Antigravity CLI bridge: 1M-token long-context analysis (Gemini 3 Pro), Nano Banana Pro image generation, Veo video generation, raw exec — filling capability gaps Claude Code cannot meet alone.

plugins.name: contexthub
plugins.description: Four-phase Delphi debate primitive: Claude, OpenAI Codex, and Google Antigravity answer independently, critique each other, refine, then converge — Claude synthesizes the final answer with consensus and remaining disagreement.
